actionDescription: Execute IQ/OQ/PQ revalidation protocol for upgraded serialization verification system. Must demonstrate DSCSA Section 582 compliance including 24-hour response SLA capability.
riskIfNotCompleted: FDA enforcement action — inability to verify serialized products within regulatory SLA

actionTitle: Complete remaining supplier DSCSA readiness audits
actionDescription: Audit remaining 8 of 20 critical suppliers for DSCSA serialization and verification readiness. Complete supplier qualification assessments and document interoperability test results.
riskIfNotCompleted: Supply chain disruption — inability to verify incoming products from non-qualified suppliers

actionTitle: Perform AI system inventory and risk classification
actionDescription: Complete comprehensive inventory of all AI systems used in pharmaceutical operations. Classify each system by risk tier per EU AI Act Article 6 criteria.
riskIfNotCompleted: Regulatory non-compliance — inability to demonstrate EU AI Act compliance by August 2026 effective date

actionTitle: Develop human oversight procedures for high-risk AI systems
actionDescription: Create and document human oversight mechanisms for each high-risk AI system identified in the classification register, including operator training materials and override procedures.
riskIfNotCompleted: Regulatory non-compliance — no human oversight controls in place for high-risk AI systems

actionTitle: Complete AI vendor contract legal review
actionDescription: Review all AI vendor contracts for EU AI Act compliance obligations including liability allocation, data governance, and deployer vs. provider responsibility mapping.
riskIfNotCompleted: Legal exposure — unclear contractual obligations and liability under EU AI Act

actionTitle: Pilot ICH Q12 established conditions mapping
actionDescription: Map established conditions for top 5 marketed products using ICH Q12 framework. Document critical quality attributes, process parameters, and validated ranges.
riskIfNotCompleted: Delayed post-approval change capability — missed efficiency opportunity

actionTitle: Review and update temperature excursion investigation SOP
actionDescription: Update the temperature excursion investigation SOP to incorporate latest GDP guidelines and ensure alignment with current cold chain qualification protocols.
riskIfNotCompleted: Inspection risk — outdated investigation procedures may not meet current regulatory expectations

actionDescription: Follow up with remaining 8 suppliers to obtain signed DSCSA qualification certificates and serialization capability attestations.
riskIfNotCompleted: Supply qualification gap — unable to demonstrate trading partner compliance

actionDescription: Complete annual review of contamination control strategy effectiveness. Assess environmental monitoring trends, excursion rates, and CAPA closure metrics.
riskIfNotCompleted: Regulatory risk — CCS not demonstrated as current per EU GMP Annex 1

actionDescription: Weekly update of centralized compliance calendar. Validate upcoming deadlines, add new obligations from impact analysis assessments, and escalate approaching due dates.
